title: randia longiflora var. horrida
intro: Randia longiflora var. horrida, also known as the spiny randia or spiny randia shrub, is a plant species from the Rubiaceae family, commonly found in tropical regions. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Randia longiflora var. horrida include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of extracts, infusions, or decoctions, and is sometimes combined with other medicinal plants to enhance its therapeutic effects.
